Donate

…that you may proclaim the mighty deeds of Him who called you out of darkness into His marvelous light; you are a chosen people.

1 Peter 2:9

Our Vision

Our vision is to see the youth of our congregation as God-fearing and serving individuals who are fruitful in ministry and in their witness in everyday life.

Our Goal (Our Mission)

In order to achieve this vision, we focus on the following four main areas:

Christian Identity

Helping young people understand their heavenly citizenship and their dignity that they have in Christ Jesus as a “chosen people,” and strengthening them to stand firm in their faith in Jesus.

Being Shaped by the Word

Since it is necessary first to know the Word in order to proclaim the deeds and blessings of God, the youth are to be shaped through instruction in Holy Scripture.

Communion of the Saints

Being a family in which young people who have come out of darkness into the light support one another, grow in freedom, and practice genuine Christian love.

Living Out God’s Goodness

Equipping young people to show the love and goodness of God in word and deed at school, in the workplace, and among their friends, and to conduct themselves in the house of God according to Christian order.
